task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Lead Router** (Level 7)

Build a lead routing API. Prospects submit leads (name, email, company, size). The server applies routing rules: SMB → alice, Mid-market → bob, Enterprise → charlie — set assigned_to automatically before saving. Need: POST /api/leads (submit + auto-route), GET /api/leads (list), GET /api/leads/new (only status='new').

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  s
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  company
  size, default 'SMB'
  assigned_to
  status, default 'new'

owner is 'demo@example.com'
allow signup and login

# Helper function to route leads based on company size
define function get_assigned_person(size):
  if size is 'Enterprise':
    send back 'charlie'
  if size is 'Mid-market':
    send back 'bob'
  send back 'alice'

# POST endpoint - submit lead with auto-routing
when user calls POST /api/leads sending lead:
  validate lead:
    name is text, required
    email is text, required
  assigned = get_assigned_person(lead's size)
  set lead's assigned_to to assigned
  saved = save lead to Leads
  send back saved with status 201

# GET endpoint - list all leads
when user calls GET /api/leads:
  leads = get all Leads
  send back leads

# GET endpoint - list only new leads
when user calls GET /api/leads/new:
  new_leads = get all Leads where status is 'new'
  send back new_leads

# Frontend page for submitting leads
page 'App' at '/app':
  requires login
  heading 'Lead Intake Form'
  
  name_input = ''
  email_input = ''
  company_input = ''
  size_input = 'SMB'
  
  section 'Form':
    'Name' as text input saved as name_input
    'Email' as text input saved as email_input
    'Company' as text input saved as company_input
    'Company Size' as dropdown with ['SMB', 'Mid-market', 'Enterprise'] saved as size_input
    
    button 'Submit Lead':
      send name_input and email_input and company_input and size_input to '/api/leads'
      set name_input to ''
      set email_input to ''
      set company_input to ''
      set size_input to 'SMB'
  
  on page load get all_leads from '/api/leads'
  
  section 'All Leads':
    display all_leads as table
